query:
SELECT 
  p.sku,
  p.name,
  pv.id as variant_id,
  pv.variantCode,
  pv.isDefault,
  vp.sellingPriceFobL1,
  vp.sellingPriceFobL2,
  vp.sellingPriceFobL3
FROM products p
INNER JOIN product_variants pv ON p.id = pv.productId
INNER JOIN variant_pricing vp ON pv.id = vp.variantId AND vp.isCurrent = 1
WHERE p.sku = 'DT-001-OAK';

  vp.sellingPriceFobL3
FROM products p
INNER JOIN product_variants pv ON p.id = pv.productId
INNER JOIN variant_pricing vp ON pv.id = vp.variantId AND vp.isCurrent = 1
WHERE p.sku = 'DT-001-OAK';
